documentationFeedback: PR body is clear. No README/AGENTS.md updates — existing docs still describe blocking start behavior. Help output is self-documenting.
observations: Log path uses logs/ subdirectory vs spec flat path (reasonable deviation). cmdStop doesn't clean registry after successful HTTP shutdown (daemon likely handles this). No unit tests for cmdStop cascade or cmdStatus changes (P2).
testCritique: Good coverage of daemonize branching (5 new tests). Significant gap: cmdStop HTTP→SIGTERM→SIGKILL cascade has zero test coverage despite being the most complex and safety-critical new code path. cmdStatus changes also untested.
